task_name: Add Custom Theme System to T3 Code Editor

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete implementation plan. **6 files, no new dependencies, no build config changes:**

---

## What gets built

### 1. `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` *(new)*
Pure TypeScript module — `ThemeColors` + `Theme` interfaces, the 3 built-in palettes, and `getTheme(id)` / `listThemes()` functions. No browser APIs.

### 2. `packages/shared/package.json` *(edit)*
Adds `"./themes": { "types": "./src/themes.ts", "import": "./src/themes.ts" }` — same subpath export pattern used by all other modules in this package.

### 3. `apps/web/src/hooks/useAppTheme.ts` *(new)*
Mirrors the module-level `useSyncExternalStore` pattern from the existing `useTheme.ts`.
- Named **`useAppTheme`** (not `useTheme`) to avoid a naming collision with the existing hook
- localStorage key: `t3code:app-theme`, defaults to `t3-dark`
- `applyAppTheme()` sets inline CSS custom properties on `documentElement.style`, overriding `:root {}` defaults: `--background`, `--foreground`, `--accent` (existing vars) plus new `--t3-sidebar`, `--t3-editor`, `--t3-terminal`, `--t3-status-bar`, `--app-font-family`, `--app-font-size`
- Applied on module load (prevents flash, same pattern as line 45 of `useTheme.ts`)
- Cross-tab sync via `storage` event
- Returns `{ appTheme, setAppTheme, availableThemes }`

### 4. `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
Grid of theme cards with color swatch strips (background/foreground/accent colored circles) and a "Selected" badge. Uses `role="radio"` / `aria-checked`, matching the existing THEME_OPTIONS group in the settings page.

### 5. `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` *(edit)*
Adds a new **"Color Themes"** `<section>` (same card pattern used throughout the file) embedding `<ThemeSelector />`. No structural changes to existing sections.

### 6. `apps/web/src/index.css` *(edit)*
Replaces the hardcoded `font-family` on `body` with `var(--app-font-family, "DM Sans", ...)` and adds `html { font-size: var(--app-font-size, 14px) }` so font overrides from themes propagate properly.

---

**Unchanged**: `useTheme.ts`, `DiffWorkerPoolProvider.tsx`, `__root.tsx`, routing, all build/package configs. The existing light/dark/system toggle continues to work alongside the new named palette system.
